title: Zendesk traces Danish roots before San Francisco headquarters
snippet: Zendesk was founded in Copenhagen, Denmark in 2007 and later established its headquarters in San Francisco.
raw_text: Zendesk Inc. was founded in Copenhagen, Denmark in 2007. The company later established its headquarters in San Francisco, United States. This sample text is for local pipeline testing only.

title: Unity Technologies history mentions Copenhagen and San Francisco
snippet: Unity Technologies began in Copenhagen and later operated from San Francisco, though sources differ on how to describe the headquarters move.
raw_text: Unity Technologies was associated with Copenhagen, Denmark in its early history. Later company materials described San Francisco as headquarters. This local sample preserves uncertainty rather than proving eligibility.

title: Trustpilot A/S omtales med dansk oprindelse og London hovedkontor
snippet: Trustpilot A/S blev grundlagt i Danmark og har senere haft hovedkontor i London ifølge denne korte prøvetekst.
raw_text: Trustpilot A/S blev grundlagt i København, Danmark. Senere omtaler placerer hovedkontoret i London, Storbritannien. Teksten er kun en lokal prøve til recall-pipelinen.
